title: Much More Tools
description: This adds more tools such as emerald and obsidian tiers, a whole new tool type and more!
body:
# ⚒️ Much More Tools – Because “More” Just Wasn’t Enough

Ever look at Minecraft’s tool selection and think, “Huh. Kinda mid.”
Well buckle up, because Much More Tools dumps a whole pile of shiny, dangerous, and occasionally questionable gear right into your world.

### 💎 Emerald Gear
For when you want to look rich and stab things slightly faster.

### 🟪 Obsidian Gear
Chunky. Heavy. Nearly indestructible. Basically the gym bro of armour tiers.

### 🌿 The Sickle
Why punch grass like a caveman when you can swoosh through plants with style? Perfect for farming, landscaping, and looking like a medieval gardener with attitude.

### 👻 Shadow Warper Chestplate
Wear it and—poof—you’re invisible. Great for sneaking, pranking, or avoiding conversations with villagers.

### 🏹 Shadow Bow
It’s dark, dramatic, and probably broods in your inventory.

### 🔫 The Infiniblaster
A weapon that never runs out of ammo because reloading is for mortals. Point, click, pew forever.

If you wanted “a few new tools,” you’ve come to the wrong place. If you wanted too many tools, welcome home.
